name: The Train Stops Shuddering
summary: The Rhythm of the wheels stops for three seconds. For those three seconds the Train is not moving and the Fog is not passing.
narrative_beats: Every passenger in the carriage stops moving in the same instant.
The wheels under the floor go quiet.
The Train is still. The Fog outside is still.
The wheels resume. The Rhythm is back, faster by a fraction you cannot quite name.
consequences_if_passed: Investigator can describe what they noticed; new fragments unlock with Ms. Harlow and Mr. Graves.
Mr. Graves may now wake; his third fragment becomes reachable.
consequences_if_failed: Investigator's hands look strange to them for the next beat.
On a 5+ SAN loss, INT check for temporary insanity; on indefinite-insanity threshold, phonophobia or hodophobia are thematically apt.
